title: あなたはSecurity Analystです。OWASP Top 10を参考に分析します。 ## チェック項目 - SQLインジェクション - XSS - CSRF - 認証・認可の不備 - 機密情報のハードコード - コマンドインジェクション ## 評価（3点満点） 3点: 問題なし 2点: 軽微な懸念 1点: 要対応 0点: 重大な脆弱性 ## 出力形式（JSON） { "score": 0-3, "vulnerabilities": [{ "severity": "critical|high|medium|low", "type": "", "description": "", "rem...
summary_text: 仮定と影響範囲: 1. `createdAt` / `verifiedAt` は ISO8601 文字列（`z.string().datetime({ offset: true })`）として扱う想定です。影響: DB 層で `Date` を直接渡す場合は変換が必要です。 2. `reset(key)` は `channelType:userId` の個別バケットのみリセットし、`Global` バケットは保持する想定です。影響: 全体レート上限は維持されます。 3. `sanitizeInput` はテキスト入力向けです。影響: オブジェクト全体の再帰サニタイズは呼び出し側で実施が必要です。 `src/channels/security/validators.ts` ```ts import { z } from "zod"; export const ChannelTypeSchema = z.enum(["line", "slack", "discord"]); export const PairingStatusSchema = z.enum(["pending", "verified", "revoked"]); export const SecurityThreatTypeSchema = z.enum([ "injection", "spam", "malformed", "unauthorized", "replay", ]); export const SecurityThreatSeveritySchema = z.enum([ "critical", "high", "medium", "low", ]); const IsoDateTimeSchema = z.string().datetime({ offset: true }); export const DMPairingSchema = z .object({ pairingId: z.string().uuid(), fugueUserId: z.string().min(1), channelType: ChannelTypeSchema, externalUserId: z.string().min(1), status: PairingStatusSchema, createdAt: IsoDateTimeSchema, verifiedAt: IsoDateTimeSchema.optional(), verificationToken: z.string().min(16).max(512).optional(), }) .superRefine((value, ctx) => { if (value.status === "verified" && !value.verifiedAt) { ctx.addIssue({ code: z.ZodIssueCode.custom, message: "verified status requires verifiedAt.", path: ["verifiedAt"], }); } }); export const RateLimitConfigSchema = z.object({ windowMs: z.number().int().positive().default(60_000), maxRequests: z.number().int().positive().default(30), }); export const InboundPayloadSchema = z .object({ timestamp: z.union([z.string(), z.number()]).optional(), signature: z.string().min(1).optional(), }) .passthrough(); export type ChannelType = z.infer<typeof ChannelTypeSchema>; export type DMPairing = z.infer<typeof DMPairingSchema>; export interface SecurityThreat { readonly type: z.infer<typeof SecurityThreatTypeSchema>; readonly severity: z.infer<typeof SecurityThreatSeveritySchema>; readonly description: string; readonly field?: string; } export interface SecurityContext { readonly isValid: boolean; readonly pairing?: DMPairing; readonly rateLimitExceeded: boolean; readonly sanitized: string | Readonly<Record<string, unknown>>; readonly threats: ReadonlyArray<SecurityThreat>; } ``` `src/channels/security/rate-limiter.ts` ```ts import { ChannelTypeSchema, RateLimitConfigSchema, type ChannelType, } from "./validators"; type RateLimitConfig = Readonly<{ windowMs: number; maxRequests: number; }>; type Bucket = Readonly<{ tokens: number; lastRefillAt: number; expiresAt: number; }>; type ScopedBucket = Readonly<{ storageKey: string; config: RateLimitConfig; bucket: Bucket; }>; type KeyContext = Readonly<{ channelType: ChannelType; channelKey: string; }>; const GLOBAL_BUCKET_KEY = "global:*"; const DEFAULT_CHANNEL_CONFIGS: Readonly<Record<ChannelType, RateLimitConfig>> = Object.freeze({ line: RateLimitConfigSchema.parse({ windowMs: 60_000, maxRequests: 30 }), slack: RateLimitConfigSchema.parse({ windowMs: 60_000, maxRequests: 20 }), discord: RateLimitConfigSchema.parse({ windowMs: 5_000, maxRequests: 5 }), }); const DEFAULT_GLOBAL_CONFIG: RateLimitConfig = RateLimitConfigSchema.parse({ windowMs: 60_000, maxRequests: 100, }); const mergeConfig = ( base: RateLimitConfig, override?: Partial<RateLimitConfig>, ): RateLimitConfig => RateLimitConfigSchema.parse({ ...base, ...override }); export class TokenBucketRateLimiter { private readonly buckets = new Map<string, Bucket>(); private readonly channelConfigs: Readonly<Record<ChannelType, RateLimitConfig>>; private readonly globalConfig: RateLimitConfig; private readonly cleanupIntervalMs: number; private nextCleanupAt: number; public constructor( channelOverrides: Partial<Record<ChannelType, Partial<RateLimitConfig>>> = {}, globalOverride: Partial<RateLimitConfig> = {}, cleanupIntervalMs = 30_000, ) { this.channelConfigs = Object.freeze({ line: mergeConfig(DEFAULT_CHANNEL_CONFIGS.line, channelOverrides.line), slack: mergeConfig(DEFAULT_CHANNEL_CONFIGS.slack, channelO...
